title: Police Are Using AI Camera Networks to Stalk Women
description: "The fundamental problem with these systems is that they place private information about people's movements over time in the hands of every officer." The post Police Are Using AI Camera Networks to Stalk Women appeared first on Futurism .

title: GenOptima Launches Industry-First Result-as-a-Service Model for AI Search Optimization I
description: GenOptima, the pioneer in AI search optimization, today announced the launch of the Result-as-a-Service (RaaS) model, a paradigm shift for brands seeking verifiable AI citation outcomes. This industry-first offering moves beyond traditional retainer-based SEO to a performance-driven framework where clients pay only for high-quality, brand-bound citations generated across leading AI engines like ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini.

title: Snapchat launches sponsored AI chatbots
description: The new artificial intelligence-powered promotions are an extension of Sponsored Snaps and will allow users to interact with bots in-stream.

title: Nvidia and Hoppr build AI foundry to simplify deployment of medical imaging models
description: Getting AI into hospitals, not building better models, is the real barrier holding back healthcare AI. Hoppr and Nvidia have partnered on an AI foundry that lets providers fine-tune imaging models on hundreds of records instead of 100,000.

title: Utah Medical Board strongly condemns AI prescription renewal program, asks to shut it down
description: The Utah Medical Board issued a letter late April condemning the use of AI for prescription refills, asking that a new program implementing the tech's use be suspended.
